item.name: Cryptlurker's Accessories of Aiming Coffer (IL 530)
item.description:
An extremely heavy and musty-smelling chest containing a complete set of cryptlurker's accessories suited for aiming.

Required level: 80. IL: 530. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
